[[Lord/Legends|Lord]] '''Triege''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] official who commanded a small fleet consisting of three [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]] and an [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] in temporary orbit over [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. According to [[Galaxywide NewsNets]], the fleet's purpose was to search for the mysterious smuggler [[Cynabar]].

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|7|Galaxywide NewsNets}} {{1st}}
